reason: Where to place new handler/trigger/flow/service code in functions/src/; this task adds a flow + extends a handler + adds a githubClient method.
Firestore paths (apps/gitsync/repos/{repoId}/pullRequests/{n}, users/{uid}), idempotency patterns, and type-strict query rules for the githubLogin → userId lookup.
Webhook handler conventions (HMAC verify, idempotency via x-github-delivery), HttpsError vs background-trigger error handling, and the try/catch policy around Discord/LLM outages.
v2-only Functions, region, forbidden patterns — the new trigger must follow these.
Use firebase-functions structured logger, not console.*; required for the new flow and webhook branch.
jest + ts-jest patterns; existing __tests__/onCommitCreated.test.ts and onTaskUpdated.test.ts show how to mock getOpenAI and nock GitHub — the new triagePr flow follows the same shape.
We are reusing tools/discordNotify.ts (currently unused) and extending services/githubClient.ts. The guide enforces the 'search first' habit before adding new helpers.
